description: Against a backdrop of a dark, starry void, the narrator explains that island inhabitants offered Odysseus's crew the fruit of the lotus tree instead of giving them directions. (objects: lotus fruit, lotus trees; location: Island of the Lotus Eaters) | A classical painting of ships at sea illustrates the narrative of Odysseus encountering the Lotus-eaters, where the fruit caused his crew to fall in
when_to_use: (draft) beats functioning as evidence — review the source span and author the roles
